features.name: assert property with disable iff and implication using same wire
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with disable iff condition that uses the same wire variable as the antecedent in an implication, where the wire is constant 0

features.name: assertion in layer-scoped module with external wire reference
features.description: Code should include an assertion inside a module that references a wire defined outside the immediate assertion context, where the wire connects to constant zero
